document.name: soemdsp-sandbox tooltip master
document.purpose: Edit user-facing tooltip and interaction-help text here instead of hunting through app markup or event code.

common.editText: Mouse: click to edit, drag to select text.

constraints.cpu: Show CPU-constrained controls. These can make the processor work harder; for example, Additive Osc Harmonics.
constraints.ram: Show RAM-constrained controls. These can increase memory pressure, buffers, or stored data.
constraints.gpu: Show GPU-constrained controls. These can make visual rendering or shader work heavier.

workspace.pan: Mouse: middle-drag to move the modular view freely. Touch: drag empty workspace to move the view. Ctrl+middle-drag or Alt+middle-drag slowly zooms, including over modules and controls. Ctrl+Shift+G aligns the view to the grid.
workspace.resize: Mouse: drag to resize workspace by grid units.
workspace.recenterOrigin: Recenter modular view at X 0, Y 0.

view.midiKeyboardDevelopment: Show or hide the mouse-playable keyboard panel.
view.zoomIn: Zoom in. Click for the next integer zoom level; Shift-click adds 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click adds 0.10.
view.zoomOut: Zoom out. Click for the previous integer zoom level; Shift-click subtracts 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click subtracts 0.10.
view.zoomReset: Current zoom: {zoom}. Click to reset graph zoom to exact 1:1. Double-click to enter a zoom number.
view.zoomHelp: Mouse: click - or + for integer zoom levels. Shift-click steps by 0.25; Ctrl/Cmd-click steps by 0.10. Click the zoom number for exact 1:1, or double-click it to type a zoom level. Wheel over the workspace to zoom freely. Ctrl+Shift+G aligns the view to the grid.
view.gridHelp: Mouse: click to show or hide the modular grid.
view.snapGrid:
Click: snap modular view pan, zoom, and edges to the grid.
Shift-click: toggle grid-snapped movement while middle-dragging the view.
view.modularBorderShow: Show the border around the modular view workspace
view.modularBorderHide: Hide the border around the modular view workspace

history.help: Mouse: click to step patch history.

timing.globalSmoothing: Global smoothing time in seconds. This controls how quickly smoothed module parameters glide toward new values. Drag the number to tune it, double-click to type, Ctrl-click to reset to one audio block.
timing.speedUnderConstruction: Speed control is under construction. It is shown here as a future global timing multiplier, but it is not active yet.

parameterSettings.tooltip: Tooltip text stored in this parameter's metadata spec. This is language-neutral and can be authored by C++, JavaScript, or any future module source.
parameterSettings.kind: Parameter value type and default formatting behavior.
parameterSettings.unit: Unit text shown next to the parameter value.
parameterSettings.maxDigits: Maximum number of displayed digits for this parameter value.
parameterSettings.max: Highest value this parameter can reach.
parameterSettings.mid: Middle reference value used by mid skew.
parameterSettings.min: Lowest value this parameter can reach.
parameterSettings.default: Value used when the parameter is reset.
parameterSettings.step: Smallest normal increment. Use 0 or any for continuous values.
parameterSettings.choices: Comma-separated choice labels for stepped parameters.
parameterSettings.skew: Slider response curve. Off is linear, mid skew bends around the MID value, edge skew gives extra control near both edges.
parameterSettings.skewSensitivity: Edge skew strength. Higher values push more slider travel toward the low and high edges, making the center move faster.
parameterSettings.linearSmoothing: Smooth this parameter with a linear glide.
parameterSettings.smoothingSeconds: How long this parameter's glide takes, in seconds. Leave blank to use the global smoothing time.
parameterSettings.showSign: Always show a plus or minus sign for this parameter.
parameterSettings.wraparound: Let the parameter wrap from max to min and min to max.
parameterSettings.displayChoices: Show choice labels instead of only numbers.
parameterSettings.divideChoices: Draw visible separators between choice regions.

script.apply: Validate and apply the current patch script
script.download: Save this patch into the local sandbox saved-patches folder
script.updateDefault: Validate current patch script and save it as the init patch
script.save: Save this patch into the local sandbox saved-patches folder

settings.uiDevOpen: Mouse: click to open or close the floating UI development helper.
settings.uiSettingsOpen: Mouse: click to open or close user UI settings.
settings.uiDevMove: Mouse: drag to move the UIDEV helper.
settings.uiSettingsMove: Mouse: drag to move the UI settings panel.
settings.makePlugin: Export the current circuit to CLAP/VST/AU/other that turns a sandbox patch into a multiplatform audio plugin. (currently unavailable)
settings.makeModule: Design a reusable DSP module from the current circuit or selected nodes. (currently unavailable)
settings.makeWidget: Build a custom UI widget/performer control for circuit interactions and visual performance. (currently unavailable)
settings.sharePatchCommunity: Share this patch with the community so other people can load, remix, and learn from it. (currently unavailable)

module.drag: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select. Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection; Ctrl/Shift+drag adds to selection while moving.
module.move: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select; Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection.
module.titleMove: Mouse: drag to move modules. Click to select; Ctrl/Shift+click adds or removes from selection. Alt+click an empty I/O section to toggle bypass. When module buttons are hidden, Alt+click the title also toggles bypass.
module.actions: Mouse: click to open module settings.
module.displaySettings: Display button: click opens this module's display settings. Alt+click shows or hides the display.
module.metaparameters: Click to open this module's metaparameters. Alt+click shows or hides this module's sliders.
module.textBoxEdit: Display-only text. Edit content from this module's actions menu. Text clips to the box height and scales down to fit width. Mouse wheel zooms the modular view.
module.bypass: Mouse: click to bypass this module. Bypassed modules are removed from the compiled engine.
module.include: Mouse: click to include this module in the compiled engine.
module.outputOn: Mouse: click or press Space to turn live OUTPUT on.
module.outputOff: Mouse: click or press Space to turn live OUTPUT off.
module.outputToggle: Mouse: click or press Space to toggle live OUTPUT.
module.executionActive:
Compiled order: {order}
This module runs at this step in the current execution plan.
module.executionBypassed:
Compiled order: bypassed
This module is ignored by the compiled engine.
module.executionInactive:
Compiled order: inactive
This module is not reachable from Output or a visual sink.
module.executionListItem:
Compiled order {order}: {nodeName}
Selection only happens from move handles or marquee.
module.scopeWindow: Module display: right click to open display settings.

displaySettings.globalLineThickness: Global display line thickness for scope traces.
displaySettings.globalSkipSamples: Skip tiny discontinuities in global scope traces. Higher values hide more abrupt sample jumps.
displaySettings.dot1Toggle: Turn global display dot layer 1 on or off.
displaySettings.dot1Size: Global display dot 1 size in pixels.
displaySettings.dot1Preview: Preview image for global display dot layer 1.
displaySettings.combinedPreview: Combined preview of global display dot layers.
displaySettings.localCycles: Number of waveform cycles shown in the selected module display.
displaySettings.localSync: Sync the selected module display to the incoming waveform period.
displaySettings.localFrequencyReset: Reset oscillator display tracing on frequency cycles.
displaySettings.localScroll: Scroll the selected output display instead of period-locking it.
displaySettings.blinkShape: Shape used by this module's blink-light display.

traceDisplaySettings.save: Save these Trace Display drawing settings to this module.
traceDisplaySettings.restore: Restore the last saved Trace Display drawing settings.
traceDisplaySettings.defaults: Reset the Trace Display drawing settings to factory defaults.
traceDisplaySettings.closeSave: Save changes and close Trace Display settings.
traceDisplaySettings.closeDiscard: Discard changes and close Trace Display settings.
traceDisplaySettings.zoomSeconds: Trace zoom window in seconds. Current stable range is 0 to 2 seconds.
traceDisplaySettings.burn: Display trail amount. 0 clears the trail; 1 keeps the longest trail.
traceDisplaySettings.decay: Display trail fade speed. 0 fades slowly; 1 fades quickly.
traceDisplaySettings.skipSamples: Samples skipped after a vertical discontinuity. Use 0, 1, or 2.
traceDisplaySettings.padding: Trace Display vertical padding per side. 0 uses the full display height.
traceDisplaySettings.bipolarBrightness: 0D Burn brightness mode. Off: only 0..1 lights up. On: -1 and +1 are equally bright.
traceDisplaySettings.dot1Size: Dot 1 size as a 0..1 fraction of the display square.
traceDisplaySettings.lineThickness: Blur of the 1D Trace Dot 1 beam.
traceDisplaySettings.brightness: Dot 1 or 1D Trace brightness. Values above 1 are allowed.
traceDisplaySettings.capEnabled: Show or hide the 0D Value line end caps.
traceDisplaySettings.lineLength: 0D Value line length. 1 reaches the display edge; lower values pull both ends inward.
traceDisplaySettings.capSize: 0D Value cap thickness as a 0..1 fraction of the display square.
traceDisplaySettings.capLength: 0D Value cap length as a 0..1 fraction of the display height.
traceDisplaySettings.sourceSync: Align Trace Display start to the detected source cycle. Zoom (s) still controls length.
traceDisplaySettings.rightColor: Stereo Scope Right channel color (Dot 1 color is the Left channel).
traceDisplaySettings.hueShift: Stereo Scope final hue rotation in degrees, applied after the Left/Right overlap-to-green mix.
traceDisplaySettings.resolutionScale: Phosphor Grid resolution multiplier on top of the display's native pixel size at 1.00 zoom. 1 matches native (looks smooth at 1.00 zoom, pixelates only when you zoom in); lower values force a blockier look even at 1.00 zoom.
traceDisplaySettings.gradientLow: Phosphor Grid color at brightness 0 (unlit). Default black.
traceDisplaySettings.gradientHigh: Phosphor Grid color at brightness 1 (fully lit). Default white.

wire.selected: Mouse: click to select this wire. Delete removes selected wire.
wire.output: Plain drag between this output and a signal input or modulation input to create a wire.
wire.parameterOutput: Plain drag between this normalized 0..1 slider output and a signal input or modulation input to create a wire.
wire.input: Plain drag between this signal input and an output to create a wire. To change an existing connection, select and delete the wire, then create a new one.
wire.modulationInput: Plain drag between this modulation input and an output to create a wire. To change an existing modulation, select and delete the wire, then create a new one.

slider.numeric: Mouse: drag adjusts, Alt+drag sticks to the mouse, Ctrl+click resets to default, Ctrl/Shift drag fine tunes, double-click types, right-click edits metadata.
slider.choices: Mouse: click a segment to choose, Alt+drag sticks to the mouse, Ctrl+click resets to default, double-click types, right-click edits metadata.

audio.inputDeviceUnavailable: Browser audio input device selection unavailable.
audio.inputDeviceMissing: Browser has not exposed audio input devices yet.
audio.liveInputConnected: Live INPUT is connected to the browser audio engine.
audio.liveInputVisible: Live INPUT module is visible. Start OUTPUT to request microphone access.
audio.play: Mouse: click to play rendered sample.
audio.playBlockedRenderFirst: Play blocked: render a sample first
audio.playBlockedScript: Play blocked: fix script before render
audio.liveOutputRunningWithInput: Live OUTPUT is running with microphone INPUT connected. Press Space to stop.
audio.liveOutputRunning: Live OUTPUT is running. Press Space to stop.
audio.liveOutputPermissionPending: Live OUTPUT requested; browser microphone permission may be pending. Press Space to stop.
audio.liveOutputRequested: Live OUTPUT requested; graph may be blocked. Press Space to stop.
audio.liveOutputWithInput: Start live OUTPUT and request browser microphone permission. Press Space to toggle.
audio.liveOutputStart: Start live OUTPUT. Press Space to toggle.

actions.addModule: Mouse: click to add or show module.
actions.deleteSelection: Mouse: click to delete selected item.
actions.copyUnavailableOutput: Copy unavailable: Output module is required
actions.copyUnavailableWire: Copy unavailable: selected object is a wire
actions.deleteUnavailableOutput: Delete unavailable: Output module is required
actions.deleteWireMissing: Delete unavailable: selected wire no longer exists

wireType.cable: Cable: draw this selected wire with the current curvy cable style.
wireType.trace: Trace: draw this selected wire as a crisp up/down/left/right circuit trace.

actions.copyExecutionJson: Mouse: click to copy the full compiled execution JSON.
actions.copyRuntimeSketch: Mouse: click to copy the caller-owned C++ runtime sketch.
actions.widthDecrease: Decrease this module width by one grid unit
actions.widthIncrease: Increase this module width by one grid unit
actions.moduleAlias: Cosmetic title shown on this module. Empty uses the real module name.
actions.textBoxHeightDecrease: Decrease this text box height by one grid unit.
actions.textBoxHeightIncrease: Increase this text box height by one grid unit.
actions.textBoxTextSizeDecrease: Decrease this text box text size.
actions.textBoxTextSizeIncrease: Increase this text box text size.
actions.hideModuleButtons: Hide this module's header buttons. The actions button stays visible so this can be undone.
actions.textBoxSingleLine: Use a single-line text box layout.
actions.textBoxMultiline: Use a multiline text box layout.
actions.textBoxContent: Edit the text displayed by this text module.
actions.textBoxVerticalPosition: Set text vertical position as a percentage of unused space.

legacyEvidence.waveformPositionIdle: Waveform position 0.000s / unknown / phase unknown / Follow Audio
legacyEvidence.phaseAudioStatsUnavailable: Phase audio stats unavailable: manifest required
legacyEvidence.visualOutputWaiting: Node graph visual output waiting for Render Sample
